svg.title: TRINITY full pipeline — FL, privacy, blockchain and results
svg.desc: Complete TRINITY pipeline with generous spacing: FL server, three city sites, DP and CKKS privacy layers, aggregation, blockchain audit via Hyperledger Fabric, per-experiment results for proj1-5, merged JSON/CSV, and plot_results.py output plots.
svg.text: CKKS ciphertexts — no plaintext leaves site

g.text: Decrypt aggregate only → new global model

svg.text: blockchain audit layer — executes after every aggregation round (proj5)

g.text: Compute SHA-256 hash of global model

svg.text: results pipeline — logged per experiment configuration (proj1–proj5)

g.text: Reads JSON + CSV → generates all plots

svg.text: Solid = plaintext / data flow · Dashed = CKKS ciphertext upload · Right rail = next-round loop · Left rail = results branch
